founders.name: Laxmi Prasad Prasai
founders.message: Laxmi Prasad Prasai is a prominent real estate investor and developer with a diversified portfolio across Nepal. He specializes in strategic equity planning and has major investments in hospitality and infrastructure. He has collaborated with the Government of Nepal and actively contributes to social service and community development initiatives.

founders.name: Shankar Bahadur Ghimire
founders.message: Shankar Bahadur Ghimire is an entrepreneur and investment expert with vast experience in insurance, equity, and hydropower. He has raised equity for 30+ companies and leads major firms like Fundrise Investment, TenX Hydro, Mero Beema, Saarathi Equity Fund, and Himalayan Energy, driving growth in Nepal’s finance and renewable energy sectors.

founders.name: Laxmi Bhattarai
founders.message: Mr. Bhattarai is an experienced energy sector leader, serving as MD of Garjang Upatyaka Hydropower (2.83 MW), CEO of Himalayan Energy (3 MW), and Director of Asian Batteries Ltd. He also advises multiple renewable energy firms, including Himalayan Solar (10 MW) and Snowfall Hydropower (29 MW), bringing 15+ years of expertise in leadership, governance, and sustainable growth.

founders.name: Er.Lilamani Pathak
founders.message: Er. Lilamani Pathak is a seasoned hydropower professional, currently serving as Chairman of Himalayan Energy Ltd., Managing Director of TenX Hydro Holdings Ltd., Director at Himalayan SolarPvt. Ltd., Chairman at Shashwat Holdings and Former CEO of South Asia Engineering Pvt. Ltd. He is also a Board Director at Ridi Power Ltd. With decades of experience, he has led the design and execution of major hydropower, solar, and infrastructure projects across Nepal.
